scripts.package: echo 'building binaries...' && cd src && CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -trimpath -ldflags="-s -w" -o ../dist/action-amd64 main.go && CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=arm64 go build -trimpath -ldflags="-s -w" -o ../dist/action-arm64 main.go
scripts.test:coverage: cd src && go test -coverprofile=cover.out ./... && go tool cover -html=cover.out
